description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, set CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE to circleeh/pocketmine:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. Include a before_script that logs into Docker with ${DOCKER_USER}/${DOCKER_PASS}, installs make, curl, jq, and git via apk, and runs docker info. Define a single build stage with two jobs: build_alpha runs make docker_build_alpha then make docker_push_alpha; build_stable runs make docker_build_stable then make docker_push_stable. Both jobs inherit the before_script and have no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
